summary: Code review verification of iteration 84 changes: mobile table overflow, sentence truncation, PDF/DOCX export design, FAQ text sizes, 'Our/We' language purge, and collapsed DeadlineTracker/AppealChecklist

ReportView_table_CSS.details: On-screen .legal-report table has min-width:600px, NO table-layout:fixed. PDF export .section-body table has table-layout:fixed (correct for PDF)

cleanSentence_truncation.details: cleanSentence function at line 38-51 truncates to 80 chars with regex extraction of core penalty, adds '...' if still >80

BarristerView_table_CSS.details: On-screen .legal-report table has min-width:600px. Note: duplicate min-width values (720px and 600px) - last one wins

PDF_export_N/A_hiding.details: PDF export at line ~4890 conditionally adds case_number and court only if not 'N/A'

PDF_export_Deb_King_credit.details: 'Created and Designed by Deb King — GLENMORE PARK NSW' at line 4878

PDF_export_NOT_LEGAL_ADVICE.details: Bold 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' disclaimer at line 5005

DOCX_export_N/A_hiding.details: DOCX export at line ~5130 conditionally adds case_number and court only if not 'N/A'

DOCX_export_Deb_King_credit.details: 'Created and Designed by Deb King — GLENMORE PARK NSW' at line 5101

DOCX_export_NOT_LEGAL_ADVICE.details: Bold 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' disclaimer at line 5325 with red color

FAQ_text_sizes.details: Hero title text-2xl (line 291), subtitle text-sm (line 294), questions text-sm (line 407)

Our_We_language_purge.details: No 'Our' or 'We' language found in FAQPage.jsx or FormTemplates.jsx

DeadlineTracker_collapsed.details: <details> wrapper at line 1164 with DeadlineTracker inside

AppealChecklist_collapsed.details: <details> wrapper at line 1174 with AppealChecklist inside

quick_summary_section_8.details: Section 8 is 'APPEAL OUTLOOK' at line 3744 (not 'WHAT THE PAID REPORTS ADD')

critical_code_review_comments: BarristerView.jsx line 1921-1923 has duplicate min-width values (720px then 600px) - minor redundancy, last value wins
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 84 changes verified via code review. Table CSS, cleanSentence truncation, PDF/DOCX export design, FAQ text sizes, 'Our/We' purge, collapsed details elements, and quick_summary section 8 all confirmed correct.
